pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Technical Foundations KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.41) to justify inclusion for the VP Analytics. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Analytics roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Technical Foundations is not a standard competency expectation for VP Analytics. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Analytics competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.41) and edge-domain placement (Technical Foundations) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Analytics. All passes support exclusion.
